meaning: n.[地质]鱼卵石,鱼卵状石灰石,鲕粒岩
examples: The types of reservoir rocks mainly are oolite dolomite and dissolved porous oolite limestone.
Oolite lime sand packs naturally with 40% porosity because the particles are essentially spheroides.
